title: eubotrys racemosa
intro: Eubotrys racemosa, also known as Spindle Tree or Chinese Spindle, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eubotrys racemosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Eubotrys racemosa is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract for its medicinal uses, with the bark, leaves, and roots being used in herbal preparations.
